title: Add site-wide contact section with centralized Instagram/email config

requirements.summary: Add a public, site-wide contact area (footer) with email and Instagram external link.
acceptanceCriteria: The public UI includes a clearly labeled contact area that is visible site-wide (e.g., in the footer) without requiring login.
The contact area displays at least: an email line (or equivalent contact method) and an Instagram link.
The Instagram link uses a standard external anchor (<a>) that opens in a new tab and includes rel="noopener noreferrer".
All user-facing labels are in English (e.g., "Contact", "Email", "Instagram").
The UI remains responsive (looks acceptable on mobile and desktop) and matches the existing visual theme.

file_operations.description: Extend the existing site-wide footer layout to include a clearly labeled "Contact" block that renders an Email line and an Instagram external anchor opening in a new tab with rel="noopener noreferrer"; keep styling responsive and consistent with current footer theme and spacing.

requirements.summary: Centralize contact details in a single frontend config/constant and render footer contact info from it.
acceptanceCriteria: Contact details are not hard-coded in multiple components; they come from a single exported constant/config.
Updating the config values updates the displayed contact info and Instagram link across the app without additional code changes.

file_operations.description: Create a single exported config/constant (e.g., email text/address and Instagram URL/handle) used as the source of truth for the app’s contact details.
Import the centralized contact config/constant and render the footer contact area from those values so updating the config updates UI without further code changes.
